title: PDF Receipt Generation for Crypto Stores: What It Actually Is and How It Works — The Full Guide
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Payment confirmed, receipt generated, download link sent — all within 30 seconds. The fully automated digital product pipeline.

content.text: Digital creators in countries like Nigeria, Ghana, and Kenya face a daunting task: getting paid for their work despite PayPal and Stripe restrictions. This isn't just a problem for individuals; it's a barrier to growth for entire communities. In this post, we'll dive into the world of automated digital product delivery and explore how the technology works to solve this very issue. We'll examine the role of webhooks, Core Shop Engine, and NOWPayments in creating a seamless payment experience that works everywhere.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

At its core, PDF receipt generation is a vital component of automated digital product delivery. When a customer makes a payment, the system generates a unique receipt that confirms the transaction. This isn't just a polite gesture; it's a crucial step in verifying payment and ensuring that the buyer receives their digital goods. For creators operating in restricted environments, this process is often fraught with manual errors and delayed deliveries. Automated receipt generation streamlines this process, freeing creators to focus on what matters most: producing high-quality content.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

The magic of automated receipt generation happens through a combination of webhooks, Core Shop Engine, and NOWPayments. When a payment is made, the webhook is triggered, sending a notification to the Core Shop Engine. This engine, powered by NOWPayments, verifies the payment and generates a unique PDF receipt. The receipt is then delivered to the buyer, confirming the transaction and ensuring that the digital goods are accessible. This process occurs in real-time, eliminating the need for manual intervention and minimizing the risk of errors.
Who This Is Built For and Why

The benefits of automated receipt generation extend far beyond the realm of digital creators. For those operating in restricted environments, this technology offers a lifeline, enabling them to connect with customers and receive payments without the need for expensive payment processors or manual intervention. By leveraging Core Shop Engine and NOWPayments, creators can tap into a global market, build trust with their audience, and focus on producing high-quality content that resonates with their community.
Automated receipt generation is the unsung hero of digital product delivery, streamlining payment verification and delivery processes in real-time.
The Components That Make It Work Together

At the heart of automated receipt generation lies a symbiotic relationship between webhooks, Core Shop Engine, and NOWPayments. Webhooks serve as the notification system, alerting the Core Shop Engine to new payments. The Core Shop Engine, powered by NOWPayments, verifies the payment and generates the PDF receipt. This seamless integration enables the creation of a fully automated payment experience that works everywhere, without the need for manual intervention or expensive payment processors.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

Now that you understand the power of automated receipt generation, it's time to take action. Start by integrating Core Shop Engine into your digital store, leveraging the power of webhooks to streamline your payment process. Use NOWPayments to verify payments and generate unique PDF receipts for each transaction. By following these steps, you'll be able to connect with customers, build trust, and focus on producing high-quality content that resonates with your audience.
How does automated digital product delivery work?

Automated digital delivery works through a webhook — an HTTP notification that NOWPayments sends to your Core Shop Engine endpoint when a payment confirms on-chain. The engine receives the webhook, reads the payment amount and transaction hash from the payload, verifies the amount matches the order total, confirms the transaction hash on the blockchain directly, then generates a PDF receipt and sends a delivery email with a time-limited download link to the buyer's email address. The entire sequence runs server-side with no user interface and no manual steps. It completes in under 30 seconds from payment confirmation in almost all cases. If any step fails, the Admin Dashboard flags the order for manual review so nothing slips through.
Webhooks, Core Shop Engine, and NOWPayments work in harmony to create a seamless payment experience that works everywhere, without the need for manual intervention.
